message:
test(conformance): add unistd_ops fixture test

Adds fixture test for unistd operations (getpid, getppid, getuid, getgid,
geteuid, getegid, getcwd, isatty, access, close, pipe). Skips cases
requiring pipe/file handle setup.

Test count: 110 -> 111

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
